text: These are a really cute pair of jeans. They are great quality, comfortable and fit well. I normally wear a size 4 or 27 and the 27 fits perfectly. Looked cute with an oversized sweater and short rain boots.
Cord does not fit properly. I have the higher priced version of this lamp, which is larger and is truly amazing to look at. This is too orange and not too bright to be really effective.

I have an older iPhone and I selected this little gizmo with the thought of having a lot more storage space available. Unfortunately I will not be using it. The drive itself is all right, but the software is not.

When the drive is inserted the first time it takes you to the App Store where it leads you to LUV Share, the application that works with this drive. It downloads quickly and easily and it does seem to work. Tucked away in the settings area is a link to the EULA.

Read it carefully. It is written in poor English, but it actually does say that the application will collect and upload your personal information. Intentional or not, that is exactly what it says and it is not any more specific than that. If you use this app, your implicit acceptance of the EULA grants your consent to have your data harvested, and since the wording is generalized, it means any and all personal data is fair game.

Unless you don’t care about your information and device security, I recommend against using this product, just on the basis of the wording of the EULA. It’s a terrible shame as it seems like an interesting and useful device.

I absolutely love these Page One winter accessories. This beanie is quality made and stretches to fit my head perfectly. Nothing warms as much as this during my morning chilly walks and it is stylish, too. Nice and warm and soft, perfect for any woman in your life (or for yourself).

The activity tracker broke after not even having a year. I didn't wear in shower or get wet . The worst tracker ever! I've had the worst luck buying activity trackers through Amazon! I believe I will NO more! When the band broke thought I fixed but only counting it did was calories NO STEPS,HEART RATE,OR SLEEP MONITORING! Boooo

This latest novel by Emily Giffin is quite the page turner! This was a one day read for me. It's more of a serious, family drama as opposed to chick lit or a romance. It takes on the subject of teen social media mistakes and has some similarities to some recent news stories. The story is told in three different perspectives - the teenage victim, her father, and the mother of the guilty boy. As a mother to both a teen girl and a teen boy, I was siding with everyone's point of view. The subject is definitely timely and thought provoking. The story is well written and very engaging. It's not a sappy, happy ever after story. However, with that being said, for the most part, I was satisfied with the ending.
Delicious big box for good price.
Neat little at home project.
These are wonderful! They keep my ankles warm, and they’re cushioned to boot.
I got this for a gift it looks cute to put sugar in. It is big enough to hold sugar and candies it is thick not thin seems durable.

I absolutely love the magnetic charging cord.  Get close enough for the port, and the cord attaches itself.  I have a Nook Tablet that is difficult to attach, and I’ve forced the cord into the port, and in the process, the port became distorted.  Problem solved.

We just bought this crib for my very tall 3 month old daughter. We love it. It's so spacious, yet it doesn't take up much floor space -- which is important because of our smallish living quarters. It has wheels so we can wheel it from room to room, and each wheel has a brake on it. The color is gorgeous, and the wood is very sturdy.

I'm looking forward to many more years of usage, since it can transform into a toddler bed, a child's bed, and then into 2 chairs!! I love Stokke!

Oh. It's pronounced like "Polka".

Expensive? Sure is. Worth it? You bet!

Very, "gun power" like Chinese tea - but not the best I've had - everyone likes something different though -  its a bit on the bitter side for me - a bit too much of a smoky finish.  Just a personal opinion.

The main device is fine. I've gotten used to the day/month read-out. The outdoor sensor readout is so small and I can't figure out why. The sensor unit is about 3 1/2 - 4"'s long, but the readout is so tiny I have to pick it up to read it. Why couldn't the readout be horizontal vs. vertical and much larger? There's all this space on the sensor that is wasted.

Very thin solid glass. I took away 2 star because it does not cover the screen of a Pixel 3a, edge to edge. There is a gap on all sides. Dirt will get under it and/or it will peel up unless you are super careful
I like the story line, the acting is a little cheesy, but worth watching
It's small but that's what I wanted as I'm adding to my collection of crosses.

What a great kit! And where was this when my kids were younger? I have a 7 year old nephew who recently joined Cub Scouts. I immediately thought of him when I saw this. My own son had some difficulties learning his knots when he was a young scout. My husband introduced our nephew to this kit and he quickly took an interest in it. It is a fairly thorough kit and comes with a good selection of paracord and other supplies. The instruction cards are nicely illustrated and easy to follow. With a little guidance from my husband, my nephew was able to successfully complete a couple of the knots at their first sitting. His 9 year old sister even wanted to learn some knots, too. He is very enthusiastic about showing his den leader his new skills.
Very nice and perfect as a gift.

I have ordered a few aromatherapy diffuser necklaces recently and most of them have really cheap looking chains. I don't want a super expensive chain for them, but I do want something that doesn't look like it's going to break easily. This chain is a huge improvement. It's sturdy and strong. The clasp is easy to use, but doesn't budge when any pressure is applied - I tugged on it pretty hard. In fact, I was half expecting it to break, but it didn't. It's stainless steel and can't pass for real silver, but it's nice looking.

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.
This not only prevents messes it allows foods to heat evenly without having them over cook

I have printed out a whole morning/evening beauty routine and have it taped to my bathroom mirror. I didn't realize that the order of application was important. Serum is part of that daily routine. The morning serum is supposed to be a Vitamin C one, so this is the one that I am using currently. The bottle seems to be plastic instead of glass, as most serums. I don't know if that's good or bad, it's just an observation. It has a dropper style lid/applicator. I don't really notice any scent to the serum, which is good in my opinion. There have been some serums out there that I have tried that just smelled foul, so I stopped using them. I have noticed if I use too much, the serum goes on thicker and white, kind of like a cleanser. It will absorb fine, it just reminds me of soap. If I use it more sparingly, it's completely clear. It does absorb well. It doesn't leave any stickiness or greasiness. It's doesn't irritate my sensitive skin either.  I've been using all sorts of anti-aging products for the last few years. I don't notice any improvements to my skin, but since I've been regularly using such products, I wasn't expecting to see any changes. I am assuming that it's a continuation of what I've already been doing.

This Instaread does a very good job at giving the reader a thorough summary about the novel, Americanah by Chinamanda Ngozi Adichie. The novel is about a young Nigerian woman who moves to the United States in seek of a better life. It alternately tells the tale of her friend/lover who takes a different path. The summary jumps around a lot, but when I read the section on the author's style, it says that the chapters alternate between the two main characters. It also says that it jumps back and forth between present day and the recounting of their past. I know that I wouldn't have gotten that from just reading the back of the book! The entire book is summarized with generalizations not a lot of specifics. Although a lot of information is given in just a few pages, it is well written and interesting. It definitely tells you everything you need to know so you can decide whether or not you want to read the full novel.

*I received this Instaread for free for the purpose of trying it out & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

This sanitizer comes in 10 packs of 10 envelopes for a total of 100 servings of hand sanitizer. There is actually a large amount of gel in each envelope (2ml or 0.068 ounces) that is good enough to clean two hands. I had more than enough and would have preferred less.

The gel dries relatively quickly and leaves my hands feeling clean. In addition, it has a nice fresh scent.

The active ingredient is 70% ethyl alcohol v/v. The inactive ingredients water, glycerin, panthenol, (pro-vitamin B5),  and fragrance.

The current price of $18.88 comes to $.19 cents per serving which is expensive. There are only 6.8 ounces in total over the 100 packets, so this price translates to $2.78 per ounce. However, this is the price one pays for the convenience and portability of these individually wrapped envelopes.

Any drink that is made from herbal ingredients is a tisane and not a tea. Tea only comes from two main varieties of the camellia sinensis evergreen. Nevertheless, this tisane is almost flavorless but it's apparently healthy. I brewed about 8 rosebuds in boiling water and steeped them for four minutes. It brewed to a pale cream colored hue and the flavor subtly tasted like rose.

I had forgotten that I tried this brand before and gave it 3 stars then. This time either the rosebuds are a bit more flavorful or my brewing method with boiling water made it taste better. There are absolutely no instructions on the bag about how this should be brewed. Previously, I tried these [[ASIN:B091BWBKNH OMIO]] rose buds, which were absolutely divine. In fact, I loved them so much, it makes me want to try rose tea every time I get a chance.

In summary, the buds do have a faint rose fragrance. Also, they need to add the brewing temperature, time to steep, and amount to steep on the package. The current price of $11.19 ($13.99 minus 20%) for 4.23 ounces is competitively priced.
Freaked them out at first. It drives my mom's chihuahua nuts though!

I absolutely adore this Scrabble game. I got it as part of the Amazon Vine program. Right out of the box, I played it with my family which included older members as well as two under 12 year old grandchildren. We all loved it. It was fun as well as easy to set up and learn to use. I know for a fact that the younger members took a tremendous interest in this version of Scrabble (which is not something they ever did with the standard board game). I would defintely recommend this inexpensive game for anyone looking to purchase gifts to put under the tree. It is educational, helps students reinforce their spelling skills, and fun for all ages.

This candle arrives a bit messy with the stones out of place and crushed flowers all over the container. However, I put all that back in place and lit the candle. The tuberose fragrance is wonderful up close within an inch of my nose. I cannot smell anything while the candle is burning unless I have my nose next to the flame.

Note that there is a nice white arrangement of "flowers" that immediately burns up and turns black when the candle is lit (see photos). To me having stones, flower flakes, and flower leaf white shapes that burn up is a bit gimmicky. It is a pretty candle in a very messy way but the fragrance is just not there. For the current price of $21.99, I would  expect a fragrance that commands the room and this one does not.  If the scent traveled, this would have received 5 stars (4.5 stars to be exact).

UPDATE 2/11/2021 - I burned this down to completion and the entire candle glass burst apart and I had a small fire on my stove. Lucky I was there to put it out. I lowered my rating from 2 to 1 star because this candle did absolutely nothing for me and since the glass bursted apart so easily, I consider it dangerous.

I have purchased other tape that is cheaper and I always come back to this stuff.  Frankly, it just works. tt's thicker and sticks on to your boxes better.  You can waste money on cheaper stuff, use twice as much of it or invest in the better quality and use less.  Guess its a choice. I choose less frustration.  I really appreciate not having to re-tape something and feel confident that it is done in one motion. Having said all of that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
Great phone case! Completely surrounds and protects my phone. Has rubberized edges for a good grip. Love it!
Perfect and easy.  Tasty too!

Sexy, Heartwarming Love!
This is an enemies to lovers romance that I could not put down, and read in one day. Kelly Jamison is the queen of Hockey Romance but takes on so much more with this heartwarming, sexy romance. Ella Verran has made a mess of not only her reputation and grades but also her relationship with her best friend Skylar, since she has come to College. Ben Buckingham is the the star forward on Bayard’s Ice hockey team and his goal is to be drafted into the NHL. As these two are thrown together, their opinions and feelings for each other will slowly and surely rock each other’s worlds. Sizzling chemistry and passionate feelings change them. All their flaws, fears and struggles will make them stronger and better together. But will their passion lead to Love? Will Ben leave Ella with a broken heart? Or will they get their HEA? The author did such a fantastic job, not only with this romance but with some very real tough life issues that were dealt with in this series. Loved it!
Received an ARC through the publisher via NetGalley and voluntarily wrote an honest review.
Great chocolate candy for a fair price.

I want to state that first my hair has a tendency to wave and frizz at the least amount of air humidity. After years of purchasing costly Keratin treatments, I saw this Fekkai technician Hair Color Care kit and thought I would give it a try. At $20, I find this an amazing easy to use alternative to Keratin. My hair was soft and frizz free. I highly recommend the Fekkai for anyone looking for a lower cost alternative to helping control their color treated hair.

This is an attractive wallet that has one front clear window ID on one side, one pocket behind that, one center pocket, three credit card slots on back side with another slot behind that. Either eight cards or seven cards and cash can fit in the slim profile of this wallet.I like the textured grain of the "fake leather." Note that this does have a vinyl shower curtain like smell to it if I hold it close to my nose. I suspect this will dissipate over time. Nevertheless, it feels sturdy but I do wish it were leather.

This is extremely thin profile and holds just the minimal necessary. I actually own several of these type wallets in different colors except all my others are leather; this is the only fake leather I own. I have many purses and use these type of wallets for when I switch among them. It apparently has RFID protection that provides unwanted prying from RFID Scanners.

Attached are pictures of both sides of the wallet.

It came with a little brush cleaner also to clean the straw out. It is very sturdy and well made. This was packaged nicely and came on time. I would highly recommend this product!

These are good for silicone pacifiers. They do get a little water in them if you submerge them in water. They bulb is soft for silicone. My babies do tend to prefer rubber over silicone, though. Also, the new packaging no longer lets you use the plastic shell for storage, since it doesn't actually stay closed on its own. It is just taped shut.
These are great.  Stainless steel all around except for a no-slip rubber bottom and a rubber handle (only on one side). Feel very well made.

These are excellent small to medium "Thank You" plastic bags for businesses and they do not smell like others I tried.

The colorful floral design is cheerful for the spring or summer. They have an "envelope" bottom with a tiny gusset (see photo), which means they do not hold as much as a flat-bottom bag like a handled shopping bag.

They are large enough to comfortably fit one 24-ounce bag of pistachios, one 22-ounce bag of pistachios, and one 12-ounce package of pasta or the equivalent as shown in my photos.

At the current price of $16.13 ($16.98 minus 5%), these come to a slightly pricey $.32 cents each. As long as one realizes these are small and do not fit much, they are perfect for the right shopping experience. I can see these being used in a store that sells lingerie or small specialty food items. They will not fit anything too wide. They are exactly what they claim to be.
Didn’t do much in the way of heating. Returned it.

I really like this travel pack size of sanitizing wipes. I work and even during this pandemic I have been flying almost once every 4-6 weeks. I love that I can take these wipes with me and be able to not only sanitize my hands but also the seat trays on the airplane and the steering wheel in the rental car. These come in very handy and I keep a good 5 in my purse at all times never knowing when I need them. So much better than the little bottles of hand sanitizer and perfect for traveling. Highly recommend!

The oligopeptides and African baobab extract in this eye cream combine to create a very moisturizing blend! It does take a few pumps to get this eye cream initially started, but a little goes a long way once it gets going. I love how the steel ball roller provides 360 degrees of hands-free movement and application, and noticeable results are easily detected after just a few days of use. This formula genuinely seems to help diminish the appearance of fine lines and crow’s feet and collected dark circles! I also think it’s really affordably priced for the beneficial results it provides, and since I’ve experienced no skin sensitivity or concerning issues while using it, I’d gladly recommend it to other skincare product seekers in search of a gentle, anti-aging cream!
a wonderful sound when played  through a Roland keyboard amplifier
I have it running an automatic litter box on a timer. I haven't decided what to put on the other side, honestly. I've tried other smart plugs before and they've not worked out nearly as well.

I absolutely love these atomizers! Mine came with a set of 3. The first one I unscrewed the top off and added some distilled water and several drops of a sweet orange Essential Oil. I figured that was easy enough. Then I read some of the other reviews about how they had difficulties filling theirs. I looked through the pictures on the description and saw how you can fill it with your favorite perfume. I was hesitant to try it on a really good perfume, so I used a Bath & Body Works body spray. You take the nozzle off of the bottle of whatever you want to fill the smaller atomizer with. Then you take the cap off of the atomizer. Set the bottom of the atomizer on top of the small tube that the nozzle was attached to and then start pumping on the atomizer. It didn't take long to fill the atomizer at all. And there was no mess! The atomizer spritzes well and gives a nice mist. I am still in awe of how clever and easy that was to fill.

*I was provided with this for free for the purpose of trying it out & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

A bit smaller than most of my other sunglasses. Very pleased with the look and design of these sunglasses. The are light weight. Overall a good value pair of sunglasses. Optics a clear and dark enough for most outdoor activities.

For some reason I still can't slim down my (every day) standard wallet to this two pocket version. That being said it is very nice for date nights or when going out on the town. I think I will be able to get rid of my bigger wallet once more places start taking digital cards (apple pay, etc.). It's padded well and fits a couple cards and some cash nicely. The leather has a nice touch and fits easily into my back pocket or even the smaller front pocket of my jacket.
so happy that I ordered these. all of the legos fit on it....perfect addition to our lego container..good price for a good product.

Only rating this as 4 starts as my 37 lb Aussie Shepherd mix did not care for this chew toy. Not sure if it was the weight or the size, but she walked around with it in her mouth for a while, tried to work on the peanut butter I had placed inside, and then finally abandoned it. I can't deduct more stars simply because for other dogs, this might work well. It is constructed well, appears to be pretty toughly crafted, easy to insert the treats and I would assume you would have hours of chew time with other dogs (just not mine). I think this is made for a much larger dog than mine, so please keep that in mind when purchasing for yours.

This travel bassinet is easy to transport and makes traveling with baby so much easier! Unless you travel or spend a ton of time outside, this bassinet is not really a necessity. It's just a little perk and would honestly go on the 'wish list' of baby items rather than the 'must haves.'

It's easy to travel with - especially with a baby and toddler in toe. We go to my dads house often and he lives about an hour away. When baby has to nap, this is extremely convenient because she can stay in the same room as us and it's not difficult to transport back and forth from my house to my dads for visits.

We've only used it outside once and it was nice to be able to take baby outside, knowing she was safe and sound in the bassinet. I also like that it comes with a shade to block the sun. I could see this bassinet being extremely helpful when camping with a little one or even staying over at a hotel with a baby. It's so much easier to maneuver compared to the standard pack and plays.

I purchased these to go on a guestbed (aerobed) and they are lovely.  Soft... I am not a sheet "expert" so I cannot really say if they are 600 count... but the tag does say they are cotton.  Now... this means if you don't take them right out of the dryer, they can be wrinkly.  I am NOT a sheet presser (my grandma used to that - and even my Dad) but if you're really sensitive to having perfectly flat sheets, you'll probably want to press them.  I LOVE LOVE LOVE the fact you get 4 pillow cases because I double case my pillows.  It's so nice to have the matching pieces.  The gray is a bit taupey gray... in my opinion.. and I'm ok with that - works with my quilt. I have washed and dried them several times with no issues to report to this point. However,  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  I hope this info has helped you in some way.  I am committed to honestly reviewing my purchases as I think it makes it easier for all of us!

Bright lights. Sturdy. Great space for storage. Ease in opening and closing. Nice quality. I’ve had it for 8 months now and I still love it.

This pill container is wonderful except that it is hard to see the pills through the case due to the black color. The portability of taking the days with me is excellent. It is also functional for those who need to take pills three times per day.

LOVES
- Each day is portable.

- Each side is large enough to hold more than 10 pills (as long as they are not super large) or several horse pills; note I was able to get six of my horse pills in each cell (CholestOff Plus 900mg)

- I find the individual days easy to fill

- I like that the day is written on the top. Also, the cell door either has an image of a sunrise, sun, or moon to remind the user of the dose.

- The plastic outside holder snaps closed well.

- The containers are easy to open.

- It is easy to remove each day from the case with the exception of Saturday.

DISLIKES:
- It is almost IMPOSSIBLE to see the pills through the case due to the black color.

- The Saturday case gets stuck on the carry case at the bottom because it gets hooked on the gusset on the side.

The current price of $10.39 ($12.99 minus 20%) is reasonably priced for this pill organizer.

These massage guns used to be an industry secret just for athletes. Thankfully, we can all have one now. They're great for stimulating your nervous system to treat and prevent all types of pain. You'll see positive results if you use it at least twice daily. This model is great because it has an easy-to-read display. The battery display goes from 1 to 10, with 10 being fully charged. The speed display allows you to customize the intensity of your massage. Use it on your feet, lower back, shoulders and neck to ease common stiffness and pain. Make sure that you don't stay on one area for too long. A good rule is 30 seconds for smaller muscles and a minute for large muscles. You'll be sore the next day if you linger too long. You can do several treatments each day. I like to start and end the day with massage. I HIGHLY recommend this product.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided makes your decision a little easier.

Update ,,planted some of these spinach seeds April 10th. We have been taking off leaves for salad from these for about a week, the leaves are dark green and fresher then any spinach leaves I could buy or have bought in the grocery store, and tasty.
I should have planted more of these seeds two weeks after planting these, then I would have spinach for a longer growing season.
A 10 star if I could.
—————-
Love raw spinach
These seeds look clean, and big.

I use spinach not only in salads but I add them to fresh Basil for a great pesto.
Take a bunch of fresh Basil and fresh spinach , allot of fresh garlic, chopped walnuts or pine nuts, a
Little fresh lemon, a good olive oil, little water and chop it fine in a electric shopper. While still in the food chopper Then top with graded Parmesan & Romano cheese, and run your chopper
Again. A little pepper.
You also add fresh parsley, etc. or just make Spinach pesto.
Great on pasta, vegetable , anything. And top with
Parm etc cheese, and olive oil if needed.
Any left, you can freeze. .

Gave this sign to my man for Valentine's Day - he loved it! Its going to be posted at our cabin property out in the middle of nowhere, Alaska.

This was used as a window on a camp door.  I thought it was just a decoration, but it isa real working window.  It has a water tight seal and latches down.  It's heavy and well made.  If you're looking for a porthole, this one is great!

6 Heat Levels, 34x17'' - At the end of a long day at a desk I lay on it when I get home and 20 minutes later I feel like I just went to a spa. I have it right on the guest room bed so it is always ready for me - I love to use it to loosen up my back before I got out for a walk. I think the auto shutoff is too long - 40 minutes would be my preference. Only thing it is not perfect for is shoulders.
